persona.label: agency consultant
persona.voice: consultant turning a vague client problem into a weekly deliverable
persona.pacing: consultative hook, clear three-part breakdown, confident close
persona.captionRhythm: client pain, audit finding, deliverable, next step

topic.pain: Clients ask about AI search, but most reports stop at screenshots and vague advice.
topic.promise: CiteLens packages AI visibility into a repeatable client action plan.
topic.proofPoint: Every audit should end with the next paragraph, section, or page to ship.
topic.callToAction: Turn one client prompt into one publishable recommendation.

hook: AI visibility reports are useless unless they become a client task.
adCopy: AI visibility reports are useless unless they become a client task. Clients ask about AI search, but most reports stop at screenshots and vague advice. CiteLens packages AI visibility into a repeatable client action plan. Every audit should end with the next paragraph, section, or page to ship. Turn one client prompt into one publishable recommendation.
voiceoverScript:
AI visibility reports are useless unless they become a client task.

Clients ask about AI search, but most reports stop at screenshots and vague advice.

That is the whole reason CiteLens exists. CiteLens packages AI visibility into a repeatable client action plan.
Every audit should end with the next paragraph, section, or page to ship.

Turn one client prompt into one publishable recommendation.
captionText:
AI visibility reports are useless unless they become a client task
Clients ask about AI search, but most reports stop at screenshots and vague advice.
CiteLens packages AI visibility into a repeatable client action plan.
One gap. One fix. One page to improve.
Turn one client prompt into one publishable recommendation.

shotList.framing: handheld selfie, face close to camera
shotList.action: deliver the hook without a cut; slight pause at the end
shotList.caption: AI visibility reports are useless unless they become a client task
shotList.notes: strong first beat, no intro animation

shotList.framing: screen recording or laptop over shoulder
shotList.action: show a prompt or search result where the brand is missing
shotList.caption: Clients ask about AI search, but most reports stop at screenshots and vague advice.
shotList.notes: hold long enough to read; avoid jump cuts

shotList.framing: creator back on camera with screen visible
shotList.action: explain what CiteLens turns the gap into
shotList.caption: CiteLens packages AI visibility into a repeatable client action plan.
shotList.notes: calm middle section; let the voice breathe

shotList.framing: simple UI mock or checklist card
shotList.action: show one task: rewrite a section, add proof, clarify category, or compare competitors
shotList.caption: One gap -> one fix

shotList.action: give the CTA like a real founder asking for feedback
shotList.caption: Turn one client prompt into one publishable recommendation.
